title: Systems and methods for setting price points
abstract: A system for setting price points for a sale product includes a data collection server that is configured to collect data from display systems of a sale product and third party providers of the sale product. A middleware server is configured to analyze and sort the data to generate a visualization of the data. A model server is configured to tune the visualization of the data and reduce artificial intelligence hallucinations occurring in the visualization of the data and recommendations derived from the digestion of the data. A display platform displays the visualization of the data with an interactive environment for data driven, machine learning informed query and insight for decision making.
claims:
Claims Attorney Docket: 100722-414736 CLAIMS 1. A system for setting price points for a sale product, the system comprising: a data collection server that is configured to collect data from display systems of a sale product, third party providers of the sale product, or combinations thereof, wherein the data is collected to set a price point for a product, wherein the price point is associated with the sale product, by searching related pricing for the sale product, a middleware server that is configured to analyze and sort the data to generate a visualization of the data, a model server that is configured to tune the visualization of the data and reduce artificial intelligence hallucinations occurring in the visualization of the data, and a display platform to display the visualization of the data, wherein the display platform displays the price point for the product based on the data. 2. The system of claim 1, wherein the data collection server collects the data based on deal rankings assigned by the display systems which display the sale product. 3. The system of claim 1, wherein the middleware server gathers historical price movements of the sale product as dictated by past market conditions. 4. The system of claim 3, wherein the middleware server determines current market conditions for the sale product. 5. The system of claim 4, wherein the middleware server projects expected future price movements for the sale product based on the current market conditions. 6. The system of claim 5, wherein the middleware server projects future buyer interest in the sale product based on the current market conditions. 7. The system of claim 1, wherein the visualization of the data illustrates past, present, future projected price points for the product, or combinations thereof. 27 44587193v1 

Attorney Docket: 100722-414736 8. The system of claim 7, wherein the visualization of data illustrates changes in a price associated with the sale product. 9. The system of claim 1, wherein the sale product is an individual product. 10. The system of claim 1, wherein the sale product is the product. 11. The system of claim 10, wherein the product is a vehicle. 12. The system of claim 1, wherein the sale product is a class of products. 13. The system of claim 12, wherein the product is a member of the class of products. 14. The system of claim 13, wherein the product is a vehicle. 15. A method for setting price points for a sale product, the method comprising: collecting data from display systems of a sale product, third party providers of the sale product, or combinations thereof, with a data collection server, wherein the data is collected to set a price point for a product, wherein the price point is associated with the sale product, by searching related pricing for the sale product, analyzing and sorting the data to generate a visualization of the data with a middleware server, tuning the visualization of the data and reducing artificial intelligence hallucinations occurring in the visualization of the data with a model server, and displaying the visualization of the data on a display platform, wherein the display platform displays the price point for the product based on the data. 16. The method of claim 15, further comprising collecting the data based on deal rankings assigned by the display systems which display the sale product. 28 44587193v1 

Attorney Docket: 100722-414736 17. The method of claim 15, further comprising gathering historical price movements of the sale product as dictated by past market conditions. 18. The method of claim 17, further comprising determining current market conditions for the sale product. 19. The method of claim 18, further comprising projecting expected future price movements for the sale product based on the current market conditions. 20. The method of claim 19, further comprising projecting future buyer interest in the sale product based on the current market conditions. 21. The method of claim 15, further comprising illustrating past, present, future projected price points for the product, or combinations thereof. 22. The method of claim 21, further comprising illustrating changes in the price of the sale product. 23. The method of claim 15, wherein the sale product is the product. 24. The method of claim 23, wherein the product is a vehicle. 25. The method of claim 15, wherein the sale product is an individual product. 26. The method of claim 19, wherein the sale product is a class of products. 27. The method of claim 26, wherein the product is a member of the class of products. 28. The method of claim 27, wherein the product is a vehicle. 29 44587193v1
